{{CargoClone
|name=Lord Sun Quan
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=122
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Wind DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Minion Skin RUSH +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Minion Skin RUSH +50%
|}}
